description_long: This is a three-seat couch upholstered in a solid, light taupe fabric with a soft, matte finish. The couch features three large, loose seat cushions and three equally sized, plush backrest cushions, all of which appear generously padded for comfort. The armrests are wide, pillow-topped, and slightly flared, providing a relaxed and inviting appearance. The back of the couch is gently curved and fully upholstered, with no visible seams or decorative stitching. The legs are short, block-style, and dark in color, barely visible beneath the base. Overall, the design is contemporary and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A plush, taupe three-seat couch with loose cushions, wide pillow-topped armrests, and short block legs. The upholstery is solid and matte, giving it a soft, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three loose seat cushions, three large back cushions, and wide, pillow-topped armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the short, block leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, gently curved upholstered back with no visible seams or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, with the same short, block leg visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and three loose backrest cushions, all equally sized and arranged in a single row; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a matte, soft texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs in a dark finish, minimally exposed beneath the base of the couch.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, pillow-topped armrests with a slight outward flare, matching the couch's upholstery and height of the backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: High, loose, and plush backrest cushions arranged in a continuous row, matching the seat cushions in width and padding.
